scope.backend_changes: none (Prisma schema + service + route + client were already in main)

findings: H1: loading flash (not-found fallback rendered for 1 frame) when CLIENT id redirects to view screen
H2: archived contact — inputs remained editable despite banner promise; only <select> and save button were disabled

fixes_applied: H1: `redirecting` flag in load useEffect, gates setLoading(false) in finally — skeleton persists until navigation
H2: RateInput accepts `disabled`, threaded into all 4 rate fields + added `disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed` affordance
M4 (accessibility bonus): all inputs have `id`, all labels have `htmlFor`; OT tier labels converted from <div> to <label>
L2 (bonus): separate 5xx/network error path with toast; 404 still silent fallback
JSX literal fix: placeholder={"14\u00A0000"} with curly braces so \u00A0 evaluates to NBSP

verification.design_canon: no hex outside #fafafa; only inline style is fontFamily (IBM Plex); all semantic tokens
